title: STREET LIGHT YOUTH SHELTER - 211info
text: JANUS YOUTH PROGRAMS ACCESS CENTER STREET LIGHT YOUTH SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides short-term overnight shelter, two meals per day, and cleanup facilities for 30 homeless and street dependent youth attempting to make changes in their lives. Youth may access clothing, medical assistance, and employment education support. When severe weather is declared by the city, 5 additional beds will open. 1635 SW Alder Street Portland, OR 97205 Eligibility: Displaced youth ages 16-24. Youth must be working with a case manager on a plan in order to access a bed on a continuing basis. Hours: 7 days per week 9pm-9am Email (503) 432-3986 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 432-3986 Main phone Intake (503) 432-3986 Access Center Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call the Access Center or be referred by a community agency. Youth are referred from agencies such as Outside In, New Avenues for Youth, Native American Youth and Family Center, and Janus Access Center. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: 7 days per week 9am-5pm Services: Community Meals * Homeless Youth Community Voicemail * Homeless Youth Hair and Nail Care Laundry Facilities * Homeless Youth Public Showers/Baths * Homeless Youth Telephone Facilities * Homeless Youth Temporary Mailing Address * Homeless Youth Youth Shelters Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - ACCESS CENTER HOUSING/SHELTER - PORCH LIGHT YOUTH SHELTER INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YELLOW BRICK ROAD STREET YOUTH SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. JANUS YOUTH PROGRAMS ACCESS CENTER
